meta.title: Generative AI for Everyone, a course from Andrew Ng, is live!
meta.description:
Enroll now: https://bit.ly/4owIphH

Introducing Generative AI for Everyone! 

Learn directly from Andrew Ng about the technology of generative AI, how it works, and what it can do. Get hands-on using AI tools, learning from real-world use-cases and best practices, and understand the impacts of generative AI on business and society to better anticipate and navigate the future.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/4owIphH
